findings.title: SageMaker endpoint not deployed in VPC
findings.description: The fraud-detection-prod endpoint is publicly accessible and not deployed within a VPC, exposing it to the public internet.
findings.remediation: Redeploy the endpoint with a VPC configuration specifying private subnets and a security group that restricts inbound traffic.

findings.title: Overly permissive IAM role — SageMaker full access
findings.description: The execution role attached to training jobs grants AmazonSageMakerFullAccess, which includes write access to all S3 buckets in the account.
findings.remediation: Replace AmazonSageMakerFullAccess with a scoped policy granting only s3:GetObject and s3:PutObject on the specific training data bucket.

findings.title: Model artifacts stored in unencrypted S3 bucket
findings.description: The S3 bucket containing trained model artifacts does not have server-side encryption enabled.
findings.remediation: Enable SSE-KMS encryption on the bucket using a customer-managed KMS key with appropriate key policies.

findings.title: SageMaker Studio domain allows direct internet access
findings.description: The SageMaker Studio domain is configured with DirectInternetAccess enabled, allowing users to access the internet without going through your VPC.
findings.remediation: Update the domain to disable DirectInternetAccess and route traffic through a NAT gateway in your VPC.

findings.title: Training job CloudWatch logging disabled
findings.description: Three training jobs completed in the last 30 days without CloudWatch logging enabled, creating gaps in the audit trail.
findings.remediation: Set EnableInterContainerTrafficEncryption and EnableNetworkIsolation in the training job config, and specify a CloudWatch log group.

findings.title: No resource-based policy on SageMaker Model Registry
findings.description: The Model Registry has no resource-based policy, allowing any principal in the account to approve or reject model versions.
findings.remediation: Attach a resource-based policy that restricts UpdateModelPackage to specific roles (e.g., ml-approver-role only).

findings.title: SageMaker Data Capture not enabled on production endpoint
findings.description: The churn-prediction-prod endpoint does not have Data Capture enabled, preventing model monitoring and drift detection.
findings.remediation: Update the endpoint configuration to enable DataCaptureConfig with a sampling percentage of at least 10% and an S3 output path.

findings.title: KMS key rotation not enabled for SageMaker encryption key
findings.description: The customer-managed KMS key used for SageMaker notebook encryption does not have automatic key rotation enabled.
findings.remediation: Enable automatic key rotation on the KMS key via the AWS console or CLI: aws kms enable-key-rotation --key-id mrk-abc123

findings.title: VPC Flow Logs not enabled
findings.description: The VPC used by SageMaker resources does not have Flow Logs enabled, limiting network traffic visibility.
findings.remediation: Enable VPC Flow Logs and publish to CloudWatch Logs or S3 for analysis.

findings.title: IAM role unused for 90+ days
findings.description: The sagemaker-batch-transform-role has not been used in 94 days and should be reviewed for removal.
findings.remediation: Review whether this role is still needed. If not, delete it. If needed, document its purpose.

findings.title: Notebook instance not using latest platform identifier
findings.description: The research-notebook-jp instance is running on a deprecated platform version.
findings.remediation: Stop the notebook instance and update the platform identifier to the latest version before restarting.

findings.title: Security group allows unrestricted outbound traffic
findings.description: The security group attached to SageMaker endpoints allows all outbound traffic (0.0.0.0/0) on all ports.
findings.remediation: Restrict outbound rules to only the ports and destinations required by the endpoint (e.g., HTTPS to S3 and SageMaker service endpoints).
